title: Governance Token Snapshot
description: Snapshot all holders of a governance token at a specific block height — returns paginated holder list with balance and supply percentage for voting power calculation and DAO membership verification.
useCase: Take a holder snapshot for a DAO governance token at a specific block — generate the eligible voter list and voting power distribution for an upcoming proposal.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
keyParams.blockHeight: Block number for the snapshot (optional — omit for current state)
